case_title: CHARLES ANTOINE MALENFANT VS. DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALENFANT, CHARLES ANTOINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP $7,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP HEARING SET FOR JUL-06-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $545.85 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $8,782.10 AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,800.00 FILED BY MALENFANT, CHARLES ANTOINE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF CHARLES ANTOINE MALENFANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. COURT FINDS DEFENDANT'S DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP STATUS IS "SUSPENDED-FTB" LISTED ON CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE, EVEN IF DEFENDANT WOULD APPEAR THEY WOULD NOT BE ABLE TO DEFEND THEMSELVES DUE TO THE SUSPENDED-FTB STATUS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT FINDS DEFENDANT OF BAD FAITH OF RETENTION OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2023 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO AUG-03-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. VOICEMAIL LEFT TO PLAINTIFF REGARDING OF THE CONTINUANCE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
